title: GTA VI + GPT-6: Rockstar's AI Mechanics Revealed
summary: AI Master examines claims about GTA VI's AI systems, debunks viral "GTA VI + GPT-6" rumors, and reports on Rockstar's actual AI patents covering witness systems, persistent NPC memory, and dynamic APB mechanics. The video argues Rockstar has built advanced real-time behavioral simulation capabilities distinct from OpenAI's models.
writeup: This video from AI Master debunks the viral claim that GTA VI runs on GPT-6, then examines Rockstar's actual AI patents and systems, including witness mechanics, NPC memory, and dynamic APB systems. It separates marketing-driven speculation from documented game design, situating Rockstar's behavioral simulation in patents rather than a large language model. The creator also compares real-time behavioral simulation capabilities across OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google models, with attention to persistent memory and NPC systems.
